description: Machine-readable coordinator gate status for the Tagflow native rich-content runtime draft PR.

profiles.description: Draft PR can continue collecting coordinated native-runtime work.
Draft PR can be considered for ready review or merge.
All non-owner-approval beta gates required before assembling the release approval packet.
Native runtime line can be considered for beta promotion.

gates.summary: Canonical native runtime surface is implemented and documented.

evidence.value: strict native block JSON document and patch transport
view-owned node taps and public adapter metadata inspectors

gates.summary: Coordinator branch validates locally and in PR #72 CI.
PR #72 benchmark gate is satisfied by internal synthetic report-only evidence.
A public package-owned Flutter route renders app-authored native rich content through the example app.

evidence.value: Owner rejected proprietary downstream app changes as public gate evidence and directed a detailed example-app route instead

gates.summary: Physical iPhone 17 profile collection completed with repeat-5 Xcode Time Profiler traces after UIScene and Xcode 27 host updates.
gates.claimBoundary: Local physical-device collection evidence only; does not support frame-budget, memory, beta/stable, public benchmark, faster/slower, ranking, or package-page performance claims.

evidence.value: canRunPhysicalProfileProbe=false for 2026-06-12-current-machine-r3 after Simulator relaunch; simulator remains debug-smoke only

canRunPhysicalProfileProbe=false for 2026-06-12-current-machine-r4; CoreDevice summary sees available paired devices, but Flutter reports wireless only and xctrace reports no online physical iOS target
canRunPhysicalProfileProbe=false for 2026-06-13-current-machine-r1; latest target audit still reports no connected Flutter physical iOS, no xctrace-online physical iOS, and no attached Android target
observed-host native JSON probe passed loose minRepeats=1 but failed native JSON observed-host policy because current host is 800x600 @ 1.0x, not 2.0x
observed-host native JSON repeat5 attempt stalled after driver connection and produced no artifacts
timeout-bounded observed-host native JSON repeat5 passed minRepeats=5 but failed native JSON observed-host policy because current host is 800x600 @ 1.0x, not 2.0x
physical-observed-profile requires a qualifying target or explicit owner waiver for beta preapproval
direct iPhone 17 profile build selected the physical device but failed before install on missing Xcode account/provisioning for dev.aryak.tagflow
2026-06-13 wired refresh: Flutter/CoreDevice report iPhone 17 00008150-00110C960186401C as USB/wired and available, while xctrace still lists the same UDID offline
UIScene migration removed the Xcode 27 UIKit lifecycle breakpoint during profile launch
repeat-5 Time Profiler traces collected on physical iPhone 17 through Xcode-beta; raw traces are under ignored build/benchmarks
Flutter driver VM-service attach remains locally blocked by x86_64-only bundled iproxy without Rosetta, but direct Xcode profile collection succeeded

gates.summary: Local report-only non-device HTML memory review is complete for the required lanes.
gates.claimBoundary: Report-only local macOS evidence: does not support leak-free, lower-memory, allocation, public benchmark, beta/stable wording, ranking, threshold, device, or real-app memory claims.

gates.summary: Beta/stable approval is intentionally deferred until real-app and benchmark evidence gates are satisfied.
gates.claimBoundary: This gate is an owner approval gate. It does not authorize publishing, tagging, beta/stable wording, or package-page claim changes until the approval packet is reviewed and explicitly accepted.

evidence.value: release approval remains deferred; no beta/stable publish or tag is authorized
